events.title: Fula Brothers: West African & American Crossroads
events.description: Mamadou Sidibe (kora) and Walter Strauss (guitar) meet at the musical crossroads of West Africa and the American South — griot storytelling traditions and blues harmonics in conversation. The kora, a 21-string West African harp, carries centuries of oral history; the guitar answers back. Joyful, intimate, and distinctly alive. Donation-based; every contribution goes directly to the artists.
events.short_description: Kora and guitar duo at Wu Wei Tea Temple — West African griot tradition meets American strings in an intimate evening.
events.price_info: Donation-based (all proceeds go directly to the performers)

events.title: Confidence and Grace: 2-Day Beginner Contact Improvisation Workshop
events.description: Two days to build a new physical vocabulary. Contact Improvisation — the form that listens through touch, finds balance through shared weight, and replaces choreography with presence — taught from the ground up. Euphoria Movement creates a grounded, supportive container for beginners: no prior dance experience needed, just curiosity and a willingness to arrive fully in the body. By the end, you'll have the tools to improvise with any partner, on any floor.
events.short_description: Two-day beginner Contact Improv workshop — movement, touch, and connection through CI dance with Euphoria Movement.
